name: Corn Dodgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a large cast iron skillet and place it in the oven to heat.
3. In a bowl, mix together the cornmeal and baking soda.
4. Add the melted shortening and buttermilk to the mixture and beat thoroughly until well blended.
5. Shape the mixture into golf-ball-sized rounds using your hands.
6. Press your fingers across the top of each round to shape them into disks while leaving ridges on top.
7. Place the shaped dough in the hot skillet.
8. Bake for about 25 minutes, or until dark brown and crusty.
